name: Three Bean Turkey Soup
recipeIngredient: 16 oz can red kidney beans, drained
16 oz can great northern beans, or pinto beans -- drained
14.5 oz cans whole tomatoes, undrained, chopped (2)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, brown the turkey, onions, green bell pepper, and garlic.
2. Drain any excess fat from the skillet.
3. Transfer all ingredients to the Crock-Pot.
4. Add beans, water, tomatoes, sauce, carrots, and seasonings.
5. Stir gently to combine.
6. Cover and cook on Low for 8 to 10 hours or on High for 4 to 5 hours.
7. Before serving, mash the beans slightly if you prefer a thicker soup.
